entries.text:
Verse 1

smell

What is condemned here is making worship a mere pleasure to the natural man, whether sensuous, as in beautiful music to please the ear, or eloquence, merely to give delight to the natural mind. (Cf) John 4:23; John 4:24.

Verse 18

tables of stone

(See Scofield "Exodus 20:4").
